channel.title: Comments on: Rahr & Sons Brewing Company: Winter Warmer, Ep. 123
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Scooter Hendon
item.dc:creator: Scooter Hendon
item.description: It's getting scarcer now. It was all over the place for awhile. There are still a few places that have it, although I'm not sure which ones specifically. If I see a bottle, I'll pick one up for you.
item.content:encoded: It’s getting scarcer now. It was all over the place for awhile. There are still a few places that have it, although I’m not sure which ones specifically. If I see a bottle, I’ll pick one up for you.

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Scooter, where can you get the bourbon aged winter warmer - I haven't seen it
item.content:encoded: Scooter, where can you get the bourbon aged winter warmer – I haven’t seen it

item.title: By: Scooter Hendon
item.dc:creator: Scooter Hendon
item.description: Jennifer- Rahr is only available in Texas.
item.content:encoded: Jennifer- Rahr is only available in Texas.

item.title: By: Tweets that mention Check out Jason Lyon of chat with the guys about Winter Warmer: -- Topsy.com
item.dc:creator: Tweets that mention Check out Jason Lyon of chat with the guys about Winter Warmer: -- Topsy.com
item.description: [...] This post was mentioned on Twitter by Kyle C. Kyle C said: RT @texasbrews: Jason Lyon (@oneal66) of @RahrBrewing chat with the @BeerAmericaTV guys about Winter Warmer: http://bit.ly/dOJpim [...]
item.content:encoded: […] This post was mentioned on Twitter by Kyle C. Kyle C said: RT @texasbrews: Jason Lyon (@oneal66) of @RahrBrewing chat with the @BeerAmericaTV guys about Winter Warmer: http://bit.ly/dOJpim […]

item.title: By: Jennifer
item.dc:creator: Jennifer
item.description: Wow, sounds delicious! Haven't seen this brand around though in Fla, though.
item.content:encoded: Wow, sounds delicious! Haven’t seen this brand around though in Fla, though.

item.title: By: Scooter Hendon
item.dc:creator: Scooter Hendon
item.description: Love that stuff. And the Bourbon Barrel-Aged variety is ridiculously good.
item.content:encoded: Love that stuff. And the Bourbon Barrel-Aged variety is ridiculously good.
